summary: Verified Discord slash-command bug fix via code inspection + REST smoke tests. on_interaction handler in /app/backend/server.py (lines 197-204) now explicitly calls `await tree._from_interaction(interaction)` for non-component interactions, restoring slash command dispatch while preserving Approve/Reject button handling. Bot status endpoint reports online=true. All previously-passing REST endpoints still 200.
passed: Code inspection: tree._from_interaction(interaction) call exists at line 204 inside the overridden on_interaction (server.py)
Empty contact_email '' coerced to null in response (regression check pass)
Frontend root loads with nav, hero, SERVER ONLINE badge visible
action_items: Cannot trigger real Discord slash commands from the test harness; recommend a manual /ping in Discord to confirm end-to-end dispatch, but the code path is structurally correct.
notes: Decision endpoint accepts 'approved'/'rejected' (not 'approve'/'reject') — used correct enum on retry.
